headline: What’s behind Nomura’s call for later Fed rate cuts?
summary: Investing.com -- The Federal Reserve is likely to postpone its highly anticipated pivot to monetary easing, according to a new "Policy Watch" report from Nomura.

content.title: What’s behind Nomura’s call for later Fed rate cuts?
content.summary: Investing.com -- The Federal Reserve is likely to postpone its highly anticipated pivot to monetary easing, according to a new "Policy Watch" report from Nomura.

headline: How The Bumble (BMBL) Investment Story Is Shifting As Expectations Reset After Recent Updates
summary: Bumble’s fair value estimate has been trimmed slightly to US$4.28 from US$4.53, signaling a modest reset in expectations around the shares. Analysts describe a mixed setup, with some pointing to better than expected recent results and user trends, while others remain cautious about the pace and durability of any improvement. This helps explain the more measured price target move. As you read on, you will see how these shifting views can shape your own framework for following Bumble’s evolving...

headline: IMF Warns Tokenized Finance Risks Amplifying Market Crises Ahead
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Moving Wall Street’s trading infrastructure onto blockchain-based systems could accelerate financial crises beyond regulators’ ability to respond, even as the technology promises to cut costs and eliminate settlement delays, the International Monetary Fund says.Tokenization — the act of representing assets like stocks, bonds and cash as digital tokens on shared ledgers — is a structural overhaul of financial architecture rather than a marginal efficiency gain, the IMF’s Tobias Adr
